requirement_topic.zh: EMC——电动自行车电磁兼容性（指令2014/30/EU + EN 15194）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——電動自行車電磁相容性（指令2014/30/EU + EN 15194）

summary.en: EU EPACs must meet the mandatory essential requirements of the EMC Directive 2014/30/EU before CE marking. EN 15194:2017 Clause 4.9 / Annex C is a voluntary harmonised-standard route that may confer a presumption of conformity for EPAC EMC when correctly applied; it is not itself mandatory law. Annex C references CISPR 14-1 for conducted and radiated emissions and CISPR 14-2 for immunity. The motor drive system (controller + motor) generates switching noise that should be assessed as part of the complete EPAC EMC evidence.
summary.zh: 欧盟EPAC在粘贴CE标志前须满足EMC指令2014/30/EU的强制性基本要求。EN 15194:2017第4.9条/附件C是自愿采用的协调标准路径，正确适用时可对EPAC电磁兼容性赋予合规推定；其本身并非强制性法律。附件C引用CISPR 14-1的传导和辐射骚扰要求，以及CISPR 14-2的抗扰度要求。电机驱动系统（控制器+电机）产生的开关噪声，应作为整车EPAC EMC证据的一部分进行评估。
summary.zht: 歐盟EPAC在貼附CE標誌前須滿足EMC指令2014/30/EU的強制性基本要求。EN 15194:2017第4.9條/附件C是自願採用的協調標準路徑，正確適用時可對EPAC電磁相容性賦予合規推定；其本身並非強制性法律。附件C引用CISPR 14-1的傳導和輻射騷擾要求，以及CISPR 14-2的抗擾度要求。電機驅動系統（控制器+電機）產生的開關噪聲，應作為整車EPAC EMC證據的一部分進行評估。

standards_or_laws: EN 15194:2017 Annex C — EMC test requirements for EPAC
CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission
CISPR 14-2 — Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 2: Immunity

gap.en: EU conformity evidence must show the complete e-bike system (motor + controller + battery + wiring harness) meets the EMC Directive essential requirements. Testing to EN 15194:2017 Annex C / CISPR 14-1 emission and CISPR 14-2 immunity is voluntary but commonly used to obtain presumption of conformity. Key gaps: (a) Chinese GB 17761-2018 compliance may not include full system EMC; (b) CISPR 14-1 Class B residential limits are usually the relevant benchmark when the harmonised route is used; (c) an EU Declaration of Conformity citing the EMC Directive 2014/30/EU must be issued; (d) the Technical File must contain EMC evidence, test configuration photos, and the EMC assessment.
gap.zh: 欧盟合规证据须证明整车电动自行车系统（电机+控制器+电池+线束）满足EMC指令基本要求。依据EN 15194:2017附件C / CISPR 14-1骚扰和CISPR 14-2抗扰度进行测试属于自愿路径，但通常用于取得合规推定。主要差距包括：（a）中国GB 17761-2018合规测试可能未包含完整的整车EMC测试；（b）采用协调标准路径时，CISPR 14-1 B类住宅环境限值通常是相关基准；（c）须签发引用EMC指令2014/30/EU的欧盟符合性声明；（d）技术文件须包含EMC证据、测试配置照片及EMC评估。
gap.zht: 歐盟合規證據須證明整車電動自行車系統（電機+控制器+電池+線束）滿足EMC指令基本要求。依據EN 15194:2017附件C / CISPR 14-1騷擾和CISPR 14-2抗擾度進行測試屬於自願路徑，但通常用於取得合規推定。主要差距包括：（a）中國GB 17761-2018合規測試可能未包含完整的整車EMC測試；（b）採用協調標準路徑時，CISPR 14-1 B類住宅環境限值通常是相關基準；（c）須簽發引用EMC指令2014/30/EU的歐盟符合性聲明；（d）技術文件須包含EMC證據、測試配置照片及EMC評估。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU; EN 15194:2017 Annex C is a voluntary harmonised-standard route that may confer presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: conditional — GB 4343.1 / GB/T 4343.2 apply to motor-driven products; not always separately enforced under GB 17761-2018 compliance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] There is a compliance gap because GB 17761 evidence may not include full-system EMC testing for the complete EPAC. EU conformity evidence should address the EMC Directive for the motor, controller, battery, and wiring configuration, commonly through EN 15194 Annex C/CISPR testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 这里存在合规差距，因为GB 17761证据可能不包含完整EPAC整车系统的EMC测试。欧盟合规证据应覆盖电机、控制器、电池及线束配置对EMC指令的符合性，通常通过EN 15194附件C/CISPR测试完成。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 這裡存在合規差距，因為GB 17761證據可能不包含完整EPAC整車系統的EMC測試。歐盟合規證據應覆蓋電機、控制器、電池及線束配置對EMC指令的符合性，通常通過EN 15194附件C/CISPR測試完成。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

summary.en: GB 17761-2018 does not include a comprehensive standalone EMC clause for the complete e-bike system. EMC requirements for Chinese e-bikes may be addressed through GB 4343.1 (household electrical appliances EMC — emission) and GB/T 4343.2 (immunity), which are the CN counterparts to CISPR 14-1/14-2. However, GB 17761-2018 compliance testing does not necessarily include full CISPR 14-1 emission measurements on the complete vehicle. Chinese e-bike exports typically lack an EMC test report for the complete EPAC system as required by the EU EMC Directive.
summary.zh: GB 17761-2018对整车电动自行车系统未包含完整的独立EMC条款。中国电动自行车的EMC要求可通过GB 4343.1（家用电器EMC——骚扰）及GB/T 4343.2（抗扰度）加以规范，其对应CISPR 14-1/14-2的中国标准。但GB 17761-2018合规测试不一定包含整车的CISPR 14-1完整辐射骚扰测量。中国电动自行车出口产品通常缺少欧盟EMC指令要求的整车EPAC系统EMC测试报告。
summary.zht: GB 17761-2018對整車電動自行車系統未包含完整的獨立EMC條款。中國電動自行車的EMC要求可通過GB 4343.1（家用電器EMC——騷擾）及GB/T 4343.2（抗擾度）加以規範，其對應CISPR 14-1/14-2的中國標準。但GB 17761-2018合規測試不一定包含整車的CISPR 14-1完整輻射騷擾測量。中國電動自行車出口產品通常缺少歐盟EMC指令所要求的整車EPAC系統EMC測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbances — Household electrical appliances — Emission (SAMR, corresponds to CISPR 14-1)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Electromagnetic disturbances — Household electrical appliances — Immunity (SAMR, corresponds to CISPR 14-2)
